title: Air-fryer chicken thighs
sources: Manufacturer guidance (Ninja, Tower, Cosori, Tefal) on air-fryer temperatures and timings — not citable as public domain, but the method itself is generic.
USDA / NCHFP material on chicken cooking temperatures (74°C internal) is the underlying safety reference.
notes: Air-fryer recipe. Bone-in skin-on thighs cooked in a 1.5-litre to 6-litre air-fryer. Calibrated for common UK models. 30 minutes total, sub-30 active. Beginner. Crisp skin is the whole point. Reference the high-temperature roast as comparison.
